hero.headline:
Your Dream Backyard, Built by
the Owners
hero.subheadline: Your backyard should be where memories happen -- not a project that drags on for months. Outdoor Innovations delivers custom pools, patios, kitchens, and complete outdoor living spaces with hands-on owner involvement from design day to your first evening under the lights.

services.label: Our Specialties
services.headline: Complete Outdoor Living<br class="hidden md:block"> Built From the Ground Up
services.subtitle: From custom pools and fire features to outdoor kitchens and full landscape design, we handle every element of your backyard transformation under one roof.

cards.title: Custom In-Ground Pools
cards.description: Tailored pool designs that complement your yard, lifestyle, and home architecture. Complete with pool houses and surrounding hardscape to create the ultimate backyard retreat.

cards.title: Outdoor Kitchens & Bars
cards.description: Fully equipped cooking and entertaining areas with custom countertops, built-in grills, and bar seating designed to make every gathering unforgettable.

cards.title: Patios & Hardscaping
cards.description: Premium paver patios and natural stone surfaces installed by ICPI-certified craftsmen. Durable, stunning, and built to last decades in Wisconsin weather.

cards.title: Pergolas & Shade Structures
cards.description: Handcrafted pergolas, gazebos, and covered structures that add shade, style, and architectural elegance to any outdoor living space.

cards.title: Fire & Water Features
cards.description: Custom fire pits, fireplaces, waterfalls, and fountains that create a dramatic focal point and keep your family gathered outdoors year-round.

cards.title: Landscape Design & Build
cards.description: Full-service landscape architecture including plantings, retaining walls, lighting, and grading solutions that complete your outdoor transformation beautifully.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Perfect Backyard

steps.title: Share Your Vision
steps.description: Tell us about your dream backyard. You will meet directly with owners Asher or Craig for a free on-site design consultation -- no salespeople, no pressure, just honest expertise.

steps.title: We Design & Build It
steps.description: Our ICPI-certified crew brings your vision to life with premium materials and meticulous craftsmanship. You will have direct owner communication every step of the way.

steps.title: Make Memories Outside
steps.description: Your new outdoor living space is ready for family dinners, pool days, and evenings by the fire. We stand behind every project with our quality guarantee.

about.label: Why Homeowners Choose Us
about.headline: Two Owners, One Promise: Your Backyard Done Right
about.description: Founded in 2007 by Asher Judd and Craig Palmer -- each with landscaping roots going back to 2001 -- Outdoor Innovations has spent 19 years transforming backyards across the Twin Cities and western Wisconsin. We are not a big corporate outfit that sends a random crew to your house. You work directly with us, the owners, from first sketch to final walkthrough. That is how we have earned a Belgard World Class Award and multiple Best of Houzz honors.

features.title: Owner-Managed, Every Project
features.description: Asher and Craig personally oversee every build. No project managers, no middlemen -- you deal with the people who built this company.

features.title: Award-Winning Craftsmanship
features.description: Belgard World Class Award winners and multiple Best of Houzz honorees. Our ICPI-certified installers deliver elite-level hardscape quality.

features.title: Full-Service Design-Build
features.description: Pools, kitchens, patios, pergolas, fire features, landscaping -- one team handles everything so your project stays on time and on budget.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprise Extras.
pricing.subtitle: Every project gets a detailed written estimate before we break ground. We quote what we mean and build what we quote.

guarantee.headline: Our "Built to Last" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If any element of our work does not meet the standard we promised, we come back and make it right at our expense. We have built our reputation on standing behind every patio, pool, and pergola we install -- and after 19 years, that is not about to change.

faqs.question: How long does a typical backyard project take?
faqs.answer: Project timelines vary by scope. A patio or fire feature can be completed in 1-2 weeks. Full backyard transformations with pools and outdoor kitchens typically run 6-12 weeks. We provide a detailed timeline during your design consultation so you know exactly what to expect.

faqs.question: Do you handle the entire project or just part of it?
faqs.answer: We are a full-service design-build firm. That means we handle everything from the initial design and permits to construction, landscaping, and final walkthrough. One team, one point of contact, one seamless experience.

faqs.question: Do you serve both Minnesota and Wisconsin?
faqs.answer: Yes. We serve the Twin Cities metro, western Wisconsin including Hudson and New Richmond, and surrounding communities like Woodbury, Stillwater, Lake Elmo, and Minnetonka. If you are within our service area, we will come to you for a free consultation.

faqs.question: What makes your hardscape work different?
faqs.answer: Our installers are ICPI certified -- the gold standard in the paver industry. We won the Belgard World Class Award in 2012 and have earned multiple Best of Houzz honors. Every base layer, every cut, every joint is done to the highest specification.

faqs.question: Can I start with a small project and add more later?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Many clients start with a patio or fire pit and come back for a pool or outdoor kitchen later. We design with future phases in mind so everything connects and flows naturally when you are ready to expand.

testimonials.name: Catherine J.
testimonials.text: Asher created an exceptional landscape design of the pool placement and hardscape that organically flowed with our home, deck, and yard. He thoughtfully, artistically, and precisely placed each piece with great care.

testimonials.name: Karen M.
testimonials.text: Craig and his team did an outstanding job creating a backyard oasis for us. From the initial design to completion, the professionalism and expertise were evident every step of the way.

testimonials.name: Nathan M.
testimonials.text: I am delighted to share my exceptional experience working with Casey and Tiano from Outdoor Innovations. The installation went smooth with very good results. Highly recommend this team.

Your Backyard?
contact.subtitle: Get a free design consultation with one of our owners. No salespeople, no pressure -- just honest advice from the people who will actually build your project.
benefits: Detailed written estimate before any work begins
